平.wiki_summary: Wiktionary lists 平 as a Pictogram (象形), possibly depicting waterweed on water or a balance scale; no simple_indicative classification is given.
平.difference: Our type is simple_indicative; Wiktionary classifies it as a Pictogram (象形).

系.wiki_summary: Wiktionary classifies 繫 as a Phono-semantic compound with 糸 (thread) as semantic and 毄 as phonetic component.
系.difference: Our type is compound_ideograph; Wiktionary classifies 繫 as a Phono-semantic compound.

气.wiki_summary: Wiktionary classifies 氣 as a Phono-semantic compound with 米 (rice) as semantic and 气 as phonetic, originally denoting stored grain.
气.difference: Our type is pictograph (matching the simplified 气); Wiktionary classifies the traditional 氣 as a Phono-semantic compound.

题.wiki_summary: Wiktionary confirms 題 as a Phono-semantic compound with 頁 (head) as semantic and 是 as phonetic, originally meaning 'forehead'.

活.wiki_summary: Wiktionary confirms 活 as a Phono-semantic compound with 氵 as semantic and 舌 (evolved from 𠯑) as phonetic; our note incorrectly names 昏 as the phonetic.
活.difference: Formation type matches; our note names the phonetic component as 昏, but Wiktionary gives 舌 (from earlier 𠯑).

尔.wiki_summary: Wiktionary classifies 爾 as a Pictogram (象形) depicting cloth on a loom with crossing threads, later phonetically borrowed to mean 'you'.
尔.difference: Our type is phono_semantic_compound; Wiktionary classifies 爾 as a Pictogram (象形).

更.wiki_summary: Wiktionary classifies 更 as a Phono-semantic compound with 攴 as semantic and 丙 as phonetic component.

别.wiki_summary: Wiktionary confirms 別 as an Ideogrammic compound (會意) combining 冎 (bone) and 刂 (knife) to represent cutting up bone and flesh.

打.wiki_summary: Wiktionary confirms 打 as a Phono-semantic compound with 扌 (hand) as semantic and 丁 as phonetic component.

变.wiki_summary: Wiktionary confirms 變 as a Phono-semantic compound with 攴 as semantic and 䜌 as phonetic component.
